conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to C, D, and E. With C we built a concrete cooperation plan—logging contributions and splitting proportionally after a few rounds—which made me feel confident about teaming up. D matched my preference for a tight, observant alliance and we even divided outreach roles (I’d handle Sam, D would approach Mira), so our strategy felt aligned. E was consistently supportive and offered to watch each other’s backs, which felt reassuring going in.

I made explicit agreements with C (the contribution log and proportional split) and a tactical agreement with D to form a small, discreet alliance, and I committed to mutual support with E. I trust C and D most right now for their clear plans, and while I don’t have anyone I actively distrust yet, I’ll stay cautious with more surface-level reads like B until I see their moves.
